description.value: You've learned to exert your gravitational field not only over objects but other creatures. You become trained in Athletics. If you would automatically become trained in Athletics (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in another skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Titan Wrestler] skill feat, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus on Athletics checks to [[/act disarm]], [[/act grapple]], [[/act reposition]], [[/act shove]], and [[/act trip]].
